## Summary

- Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore

## Testing

- [ ] Verified locally
- [ ] Seed data validated (if applicable)
- [ ] API endpoints tested (if applicable)

## Screenshots / Evidence

Attach screenshots, logs, or API examples when useful.

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets added
- [ ] Docs updated for behavior/config changes
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and scoped
